title: Commercial Proposal Engineer (Central) Basic + AWS + VB! HSW
description:
Job Summary:

  • Responsible for creating competitive proposals with accurate costing and clearly defined scopes.
  • Works closely with the Sales team, Customers, Vendors, Finance, and Legal/Contract teams to support opportunities such as parts supply, technical assistance, turnkey projects, and upgrade projects.
  • Requires strong financial understanding to prepare cost calculations and pricing models, as well as the ability to review and negotiate contract terms. The Assistant Manager also participates in meetings to explain technical details, manage terms and conditions deviations, and negotiate commercial matters with customers.
  • In addition to proposal development, the Assistant Manager supports project execution, business operations, and cross-functional collaboration. Strong problem-solving skills, time management, and regular reporting to stakeholders are essential to ensure smooth and timely delivery of projects and proposals.

Key Responsibilities:

50% – Commercial Proposals, Costing & Contract Support

  • Prepare detailed cost calculations, including complex turnkey project estimates in collaboration with Finance teams.
  • Develop and submit competitive proposals and accurate invoices.
  • Work closely with the Legal/Contract team to review, interpret, and propose deviations to Terms & Conditions.
  • Negotiate pricing, scope, terms, and conditions with customers and vendors.
  • Follow up with customers to ensure timely payments.
  • Support the preparation and execution of annual sales forecasts.
  • Prepare tender submissions, pricing strategies, and sales strategies.
  • Participate in the development of long-term service agreements (LTSA).

20% – Customer Engagement, Technical & Contractual Communication

  • Prepare and deliver service presentations to prospective customers.
  • Serve as the key contact between the company and customers for all commercial and technical clarifications.
  • Address technical queries with support from engineering teams.
  • Explain contract terms, commercial implications, and technical scope during meetings.
  • Maintain strong technical knowledge of relevant equipment.

15% – Project Coordination, After-Sales & Issue Resolution

  • Monitor, coordinate, and report on sales, proposals, project progress, and product delivery status.
  • Assist customers with issues arising after installation or during product usage.
  • Identify problems, propose solutions, and escalate issues when needed.
  • Communicate customer feedback, claims, and improvement suggestions to management.
  • Support commercial matters related to the Service Business.
  • Collaborate with Project Teams on execution, internal processes, and risk assessment.

10% – Market Insights, Analysis & Strategy Development

  • Stay updated on customer purchasing trends and after-sales needs.
  • Study competitor technologies and market trends in the power sector.
  • Identify target customers and product opportunities.
  • Analyse data to identify sales patterns, financial impact, and market trends.
  • Propose tailored solutions based on market demand and commercial viability.

5% – Business Tools, Process Efficiency & Team Support

  • Become proficient in using internal business tools and platforms.
  • Propose process improvements to increase quotation accuracy and reduce turnaround time.
  • Guide team members on best practices for commercial documentation and quotation preparation.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Engineering, Technical, or Business disciplines.
  • Experience in sales techniques, sales support, and negotiation is an advantage.
  • Strong financial understanding (costing, pricing, margins) and ability to interpret commercial/contract terms.
  • Familiarity with legal and contractual documentation, including Incoterms and local regulations.
  • Knowledge of site working conditions.

HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, kindly send your resume in MS WORD format or please click on “Apply Now”.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website

www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 19C9950

EA Personnel: Hong Sze Wai (Sharon)

EA Personnel Reg No: R25128240

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
